Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher B. Allard, Esq. of Bennett Samuelsen, (510-444-7688), for 233-237 Eddy Street, LLC, Defendant and moving party.
Steven J. McDonald, Esq. of Greenstein & McDonald, (415-773-1240), for Kevin Nobles,
Plaintiff and opposing party.
Mark Hooshmand, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group, (415-376-5897), for Plaintiffs in case no. 539431.
Reporter Frederick Rick Galten, CSR #13202, (415-591-3333).

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT 233-237 EDDY STREET, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-539431 WITH CASE CGC-14-537445 is DENIED, consolidation of these cases will not serve judicial economy and/or convenience of the parties; it will be confusing to the jury and prejudicial to plaintiffs. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Frederick Rick Galten, CSR #13202, (415-591-3333), D501.
